responsibilities: You will build services with Python, FastAPI and MongoDB, collaborate with product and ensure API performance.
raw_job_description:
Backend Python Engineer
We are hiring a backend engineer to design and maintain REST APIs for our recruiting platform. You will build services with Python, FastAPI and MongoDB, collaborate with product and ensure API performance. Requirements: 3+ years of experience, Python, FastAPI, MongoDB, REST API, Docker. Nice to have: AWS and CI/CD. Full-time hybrid role based in Tunis. English required.
